Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/rankings.json'\); console.log\('dailyRankings count:', d.dailyRankings?.length ?? 0\); if\(d.dailyRankings?.length\) { console.log\('sample:', JSON.stringify\(d.dailyRankings.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/data/rankings.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('dailyOverallRankings count:', d.dailyOverallRankings?.length\); console.log\('first entry:', JSON.stringify\(d.dailyOverallRankings?.[0]\)\); console.log\('second entry:', JSON.stringify\(d.dailyOverallRankings?.[1]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/data/rankings.json','utf8'\)\); const genres = [...new Set\(d.dailyOverallRankings.map\(e=>e.genre\)\)]; console.log\('genres in dailyOverallRankings:', genres\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/data/rankings.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('dataThrough:', d.meta.dataThrough\); console.log\('週排行:', d.weeklyRankings.length, '週'\); console.log\('總積分榜:', d.overallRankings.length, '部'\); console.log\('台劇積分榜:', d.taiwanDramaRankings.length, '部'\); console.log\('每日\(台劇\):', d.dailyRankings.length, '筆'\); console.log\('日榜總排行:', d.dailyOverallRankings.length, '部'\); console.log\('Top3日榜:', d.dailyOverallRankings.slice\(0,3\).map\(r=>r.rank+'. '+r.title+' '+r.totalScore+'分/'+r.weeksOnChart+'天'\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX=require\('xlsx'\); const wb=XLSX.readFile\('C:/Users/User/Desktop/爬蟲臉書/output/export.xlsx'\); const sheet=wb.Sheets['Netflix 每週節目排名'] || wb.Sheets['Netflix 每週電排名']; const rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(sheet,{defval:''}\); const dates=rows.map\(r=>r['日期迄']\).filter\(Boolean\); const maxSerial=Math.max\(...dates\); const d=new Date\(\(maxSerial-25569\)*86400*1000\); console.log\('Excel最新日期迄:', d.toISOString\(\).split\('T'\)[0]\); console.log\('週排行筆數:', rows.length\);")
